data.title: Kyrgyzstan launches gold-backed stablecoin USDKG
data.description:
The government of Kyrgyzstan has officially launched USDKG, a stablecoin backed by gold and pegged to the U. S. fiat currency. The authorities in Bishkek expect that the crypto, issued by a state-owned entity, will put the country on the map of global finances and attract investments. Kyrgyzstan to issue 50 million USDKG tokens on Tron […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/kyrgyzstan-launches-gold-backed-stablecoin-usdkg/

data.title: Trump's CFTC Pick, Mike Selig, Clears Hurdle on Way Toward Confirmation Vote
data.description:
Mike Selig, who has been nominated by former President Donald Trump to serve on the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), has successfully navigated a significant milestone in the confirmation process as he has cleared a crucial hurdle. This progress paves the way for him to potentially receive a vote for confirmation in the near future.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2025/11/20/trump-s-cftc-pick-mike-selig-clears-hurdle-on-way-toward-confirmation-vote

data.title: Roblox struggles to convert its 150 million users into ad dollars amid sponsor wariness
data.description:
Roblox has been trying to turn its giant audience into real ad money since it went public in 2021, but the effort keeps dragging. The platform pulls in 150 million users who spend two hours a day wandering through virtual worlds filled with billboards, video spots, and branded spaces. Executives keep saying the ad market […]

data.title: Nvidia-Armenia AI project signals U.S. push into Caucasus long dominated by Moscow
data.description:
Nvidia just got cleared by the U. S. government to export its chips to Armenia, a country whose entire economy is about 160 times smaller than Nvidia’s $4. 5 trillion market cap. That approval puts the world’s most powerful/valuable company directly in partnership with a tiny Caucasus nation that’s now central to a much larger political chessboard. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/nvidia-armenia-ai-project/

data.title: Altcoin News: HBAR Faces Fresh Liquidity Alarms After Breakdown to $0.1373 as Trading Halt Raises Market Stress Concerns
data.description: Hedera’s HBAR token fell sharply to $0.1373 on Thursday, breaking below a key support zone and triggering renewed fears about structural liquidity conditions after a sudden two-minute trading halt and unstable volume patterns compounded the late-session selloff.The move confirms a transition from neutral consolidation into a clear bearish market structure, with multiple indicators pointing to increasing liquidity fragility and failed attempts at recovery.Key TakeawaysHBAR broke below the crucial $0.145 support, hitting $0.1373 and flipping consolidation into a bearish setup.A two-minute zero-volume halt (14:12–14:14) suggests technical instability or acute liquidity shortage.A 138% volume spike at $0.1486 failed to generate follow-through, confirming heavy overhead supply.$0.1382 remains the final near-term support; $0.1445 has become immediate resistance on any rebound.HBAR Breaks Below Support as Late-Session Liquidity CrumblesHBAR’s slide to $0.1373 marks its cleanest breakdown yet below the long-defended $0.145 support. The late-session decline accelerated into the close, turning what had been a flat consolidation range into a decisive bearish shift.Liquidity thinned dramatically in the final hour, culminating in a two-minute stretch (14:12–14:14) of zero recorded volume — a highly unusual event for a top-50 asset.Analysts say the halt could signal either:a technical disruption on matching engines,or a short-term liquidity air pocket,both of which can intensify downside velocity during periods of stress.Failed Rebound Highlights Structural WeaknessEarlier in the session, HBAR attempted a V-shaped recovery from its $0.1382 intraday low, powered by a 138% surge in volume — with 146.94 million tokens traded versus an average of 61.8 million.But the rebound collapsed abruptly at $0.1486, a level that now stands as the session’s strongest confirmation of overhead supply.The loss of momentum left HBAR vulnerable, with sellers quickly reasserting control and forcing the breakdown into the close.Key Technical Levels: Momentum Shifts Decisively BearishSupport Levels$0.1382 — final short-term support; loss exposes deeper downside$0.1373 — breakdown point and current local lowResistance Levels$0.1445 — former support turned resistance$0.1486 — major resistance where the 138% volume spike was rejectedVolume Structure+138% surge attempted breakout → failed9.76M volume before breakdown → steep contractionZero-volume halt → liquidity fractureChart StructureConsolidation range $0.1446–$0.1477 invalidatedV-shaped recovery attempt failedTotal session range 6.5%, signaling elevated volatilityRisk Analysis: Liquidity and Structural Stress RisingHBAR’s breakdown is now characterized by three converging stress signals:Support failure below $0.145Break in volume continuity with a zero-trade haltHeavy supply confirmation at $0.1486Market depth appears compromised, and analysts caution that further deterioration could expose the token to broader liquidity-driven declines.Immediate risks:Loss of $0.1382 could accelerate sellingAny recovery is likely to stall at $0.1445 and $0.1486Structural liquidity stress may persist into next sessions

data.title: Altcoin News: ICP Breaks Below Key Support as Volume Surges at Resistance Test, Heightening Downside Risk
data.description: ICP fell below the crucial $4.95 support this week, with a sharp volume spike near resistance confirming a fresh rejection and pushing the token into a tighter consolidation range below $4.98. Despite the structural breakdown, ICP traded modestly higher over the past 24 hours—signaling indecision but reinforcing short-term downside pressure.Key TakeawaysICP is trading near $4.80, up 0.75% in 24 hours despite earlier weakness.A 5.63M volume surge (+85% above average) aligned with a failed retest of $4.98 resistance.New support sits at $4.63, with resistance forming at $4.98–$5.13.Latest data shows ICP slipping through $4.93, tightening pressure on the $4.90 psychological zone.ICP Struggles to Reclaim Lost Support After $4.95 BreakdownInternet Computer (ICP) continues to show signs of overhead pressure, trading near $4.80 after losing the $4.95 support earlier in the session. The token moved within a $0.48 intraday range, reflecting a 9.6% volatility window as repeated recovery attempts faltered.CoinDesk Research’s technical model notes that ICP has repeatedly failed to regain higher consolidation levels, signaling weakening momentum as price compresses below resistance.Volume Spikes as ICP Rejected at $4.98A decisive inflection occurred at 19:00 UTC on Wednesday, when trading activity surged to 5.63 million tokens, an 85% jump relative to the 24-hour average.The spike coincided with a failed attempt to break above $4.98, confirming that:Sellers remain firmly positioned near the $4.98–$5.00 bandHeavy distribution is forming at the top of the current intraday rangeICP briefly touched $4.99 during a mid-session uptick, but immediate selling pressure halted the advance and sent price rotating lower.Price Action Turns Heavier as $4.90 Comes Under PressureOver the latest hourly intervals, ICP slipped through $4.93, intensifying pressure on the $4.90 psychological floor. While price briefly stabilized near $4.917, the technical structure continues to lean bearish unless ICP can reclaim levels above $4.98.Market analysts highlight that downward momentum is strengthening, with overhead resistance compressing the consolidation range and reducing the probability of a near-term bullish breakout.Key Technical Levels to WatchSupport$4.63 — critical lower support and prior pivot zone during recent pullbacksResistance$4.98 — immediate resistance reinforced by the volume spike$5.13 — upper resistance band marking the top of the prior rangeRange StructureICP now trades within a narrowing band between $4.63 and $4.98.A break below $4.63 opens a continuation move lower, while a close above $4.98 would be the first positive technical signal in several sessions.Direction Hinges on Volume and Boundary BreakWith volume contracting after Wednesday’s surge and resistance repeatedly rejecting advances, ICP’s short-term outlook leans bearish. Without renewed buy-side participation and a confirmed reclaim of $4.98, the token is likely to remain trapped in its compression range — with the next directional impulse dependent on which boundary cracks first.
